_comment: Template for personal config. Copy to your user data directory and rename to config.json. Linux: ~/.local/share/chessanalyzerpro/config.json | macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/ChessAnalyzerPro/config.json | Windows: %APPDATA%/ChessAnalyzerPro/config.json. Do NOT commit your real config.json — it contains personal API keys and paths.
_comment_llm: Define as many LLM profiles as you like. Set llm_active_profile to the name of the one you want to use.
_comment_window_state: Last-known main window position and size. Written automatically when the app closes, read on next launch. Leave the values as null to let Qt choose defaults.
